# atlassian_jira_custom_field (Resource)

Manages a Jira Cloud custom field.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "atlassian_jira_custom_field" "example" {
  name = "Example Custom Field"
  type = "com.atlassian.jira.plugin.system.customfieldtypes:textfield"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the custom field.
- `type` (String) The type of the custom field (e.g. com.atlassian.jira.plugin.system.customfieldtypes:textfield). Changing this forces recreation.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the custom field.
- `searcher_key` (String) The searcher key for the custom field (e.g. com.atlassian.jira.plugin.system.customfieldtypes:textsearcher). Changing this forces recreation.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the custom field (e.g. customfield_10100).
